name: Amazon Echo Dot (5th Gen)
summary: Best-selling smart speaker with improved sound quality and built-in Zigbee hub for smart home control.
features: Improved audio with clearer vocals and deeper bass
Built-in Zigbee hub for connecting compatible devices
Alexa voice assistant for smart home control
Tap gestures to pause/play music or snooze alarms
Privacy controls with mic off button

specs.Speaker: 1.73-inch front-firing driver
specs.Colors: Charcoal, Glacier White, Deep Sea Blue

pros: Significantly better sound than previous generation
Built-in Zigbee hub saves buying separate hub
Works with thousands of smart home devices
cons: Limited compared to Echo Show with screen

bestFor: Alexa users wanting affordable voice control and smart home hub functionality
